name: Team Kasich
subject: The Latest: 🏈 Super Bowl Edition 🏈
body:
Governor Kasich spoke out against the efforts to discredit
American institutions for partisan gain. The governor has emerged
as a leading voice in our country urging all Americans to choose
the higher path.

Peter, Ohio Governor John
Kasich joined the Ohio Board of Pharmacy in announcing new
regulations for drug wholesalers to give officials better tools
to combat prescription drug abuse. With these new regulations,
Ohio will have one of - if not the most - comprehensive and
rigorous approaches to combating the opiate epidemic of any state
in the nation.

Governor Kasich also spoke out
against the efforts to discredit American institutions for
partisan gain. The governor has emerged as a leading voice in our
country urging all Americans to choose the higher path.

Recent Interviews:

Morning Joe (1/30/18)

Late Night with Seth Meyers
(1/29/18)

Deadline: White House w/ Nicolle
Wallace (1/30/18)

News:

From the Associated Press:

"Wholesalers that distribute
prescription drugs to pharmacies, doctors and hospitals would
have to report more information about suspicious orders to Ohio
regulators, as part of the state's fight against the deadly
opioid epidemic.

The proposed rules were announced
by Gov. John Kasich on Thursday.

The state also wants to require
that drug distributors do a better job researching their
customers and to hold onto suspicious orders until questions are
answered about the drugs' destination."

"…Ohio's rules will be the
strongest in the country, said Carmen Catizone, executive
director of the National Association of Boards of Pharmacy." Read
more here.

--

Thank you for your ongoing
support!

-Team Kasich

P.S. If you'd like to chip in to
support Gov. Kasich's message, please consider making a generous
donation (here)

Paid for by Kasich
for America, not authorized by any candidate or candidate's
committee.
www.JohnKasich.com

name: Debbie Wasserman Schultz
subject: Straight talk
disclaimer_text: Paid for and Authorized by Debbie Wasserman Schultz for Congress This email was sent to [dpwillis67@gmail
body:
| |
---
| |
---
| | | "The tax cut for corporate America is theft. It is theft from the future." _\- Nancy Pelosi, 1/25_
---
In case you missed this: Leader Pelosi joined me in Florida last month.
We talked about how the Republican "tax reform" plan was nothing but a scam to hand permanent tax breaks to billionaires.
We also talked about how we stop the right-wing agenda coming from Washington: **Grassroots organizing.**
That's where you come in.
[_**Our mid-quarter FEC deadline is coming up in less than two weeks -- and we need to start preparing now. Can you pitch in?**_](https://secure.debbiewassermanschultz.com/page/m/10113f82/622b7b5b/195969c8/307bb6e3/2678974361/VEsH/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dwse180130?refcode=dwse180130_m&recurring=true&amount=5")
The Republican tax scam is fantastic for the wealthiest one percent and giant corporations -- a.k.a, Republican donors and their allies.
But what did it do for everyone else?
* **Eventually, it will raise taxes on middle class Americans.**
* **It repealed a critical part of the Affordable Care Act, putting access to health care at risk for millions.**
* **It adds $1.5 TRILLION to our deficit -- paving the way for Republicans to come after Medicare and/or Social Security.**

Republicans made it painfully clear they care very little about how their policies affect working Americans. We must make equally clear that no matter what they do, we will fight back together.
[_**Help us surpass this goal and keep our efforts growing. Give whatever you can. Even $5 or $10 will go a long, long way.**_](https://secure.debbiewassermanschultz.com/page/m/10113f82/622b7b5b/195969c8/307bb6e3/2678974361/VEsE/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dwse180130?refcode=dwse180130_m&recurring=true&amount=5")
Thank you.
Debbie
Paid for and Authorized by Debbie Wasserman Schultz for Congress This email was sent to [dpwillis67@gmail.com](mailto:dpwillis67@gmail.com)
[Click here](https://secure.debbiewassermanschultz.com/page/m/10113f82/622b7b5b/195969c8/307bb6e2/2678974361/VEsF/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSJ9/ "http://www.debbiewassermanschultz.com/subscriptions/?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com") to unsubscribe
---

name: petition@maggiehassan.com
subject: Tell Betsy DeVos: Protect Our Students
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Maggie for NH
body:
[](http://act.maggiehassan.com/page/m/f7fdfce/2a380d31/7e5e9f9/f1d77a/518746007/VEsH/ "http://www.maggiehassan.com/")
[](http://act.maggiehassan.com/page/m/f7fdfce/2a380d31/7e5e9f9/f1d77a/518746007/VEsE/ "http://www.maggiehassan.com/")
Hi there,
In her first year as Secretary of Education, Betsy DeVos has tried to jam through enormous funding cuts for our public schools, failed to stand up against discrimination and sexual harassment in our education system, and blocked policies that could help make student loan debt more manageable.
Senator Hassan is leading the fight against the discriminatory education policies DeVos is pushing through, but she can't do it without your help. [**Please join grassroots supporters across the country and sign our petition telling Betsy DeVos to protect our students.**](http://act.maggiehassan.com/page/m/f7fdfce/2a380d31/7e5e9f9/f1d77b/518746007/VEsF/p/eyJKU1ZHU1ZKVFZFNUJUVVVsSlE9PSI6IiIsIkpTVk1RVk5VVGtGTlJTVWwiOiIiLCJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVmFTVkFsSlE9PSI6IjAzMjY0In0=/ "https://petitions.signforgood.com/devosoneyear/?code=hassan&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=03264&redirect=https%3A%2F%2Fsecure.actblue.com%2Fdonate%2F2018_devos-1-year")
DeVos's first year has lived up to our very worst fears, but we can stop her from further harming our students and teachers if we all speak up now.
Thank you for making your voice heard,
Team Maggie

[Contribute](http://act.maggiehassan.com/page/m/f7fdfce/2a380d31/7e5e9f9/f1d764/518746007/VEsC/p/eyJlM3NnWVdKd1lXZGxJSDE5IjoiMjAxOF9kZXZvcy0xLXllYXIiLCJlM3NnY21WbVkyOWtaU0I5ZlE9PSI6ImUyMDE4MDIwNF9EZVZvczFZZWFyX2FjdCIsImUzc2dURkJCUVZGMVpYSjVVM1J5YVc1bklIMTkiOiIzLDI1LDUwLDEwMCwyNTAsNTAwIn0=/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/2018_devos-1-year?refcode=e20180204_DeVos1Year_act&amounts=3,25,50,100,250,500")

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com.

name: NHGOP Press & Communications
subject: Forrester Statement on the passing of Senator Cataldo
body:
**Forrester Statement on the passing of Senator Cataldo**

**For Immediate Release:** 2/4/2018
**Contact:** Patrick Hynes, (202) 321-5310
CONCORD - NH GOP Chair Jeanie Forrester released the following statement regarding passing of Senator Cataldo:
"It is with sadness that we learned of the passing of former State Senator Sam Cataldo of Farmington. Having seen him last week at our Annual Meeting, all present saw Sam full of life. Through his service in the House and Senate, he was a dedicated member of his community and served his constituents with passionate dedication and will be dearly missed. Our thoughts and prayers are with his family and loved ones at this time."
###
---
---

body:

| Hope everyone is enjoying their Sunday! Will you be watching the Super Bowl tonight?
---
| | [ ](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=80d255427d5b4d6fa3cb87d23cf0003e&_m=36d98774352d41779933d9bedc3672f6&_e=LQ_k68PED4DFRPqkYfs8dV0Wa7724CtpufeetRm0L3oQm9z7va8Nunfcheev2B3HcXk6hVQZ-jpCuuQVP4EobMsEd4-u5hea-zIucipyDtIEKuaUz0riEkmT9F7SZ1CO56tfceJsUwWIv4u1cBoH8KGgw30k4LUHJb9rfdWbBoLz67SnkftJhCdRGXeUYc8lxlPbUY35sg2u1FU-v7ewBDO_v-bnXg87wNDy1cksuaaZiAwpw5oYNsdHmr2lGignUOPQaJ85tuhE6R-QKnj--sizB3JpCtsVJTomO8BeV7M%3D)
---
Earlier this week, [Leah called on the NFL](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=80d255427d5b4d6fa3cb87d23cf0003e&_m=36d98774352d41779933d9bedc3672f6&_e=LQ_k68PED4DFRPqkYfs8dV0Wa7724CtpufeetRm0L3oQm9z7va8Nunfcheev2B3HcXk6hVQZ-jpCuuQVP4EobCXMgoPcYW0Vn8UNhx0YDJt1InBczX1DcxA0Z2Wvpm7nt4V7M-7VSaLp4s6mSZzHDdq9iUAoebJ4jzmcq9w9wZH4I9_WO_aBhtVBHRmQgaMhAVVu7IzjcVlogjRQdtWi6gWQR6RYO3-3hMJ6cEvF4hLXWHvqB6XGofJBagL19mQqX2OtMWN7s34prCTvZTsZoAUmaNsvjpnw2r_9oGM64-A%3D) to show the AMVETS ad that encouraged people to stand for the National Anthem at the Super Bowl. Unfortunately, the Star Spangled Banner is too political, and the ad was rejected.

Let our veterans know you stand with them by tweeting **#PleaseStand** during the National Anthem of the Super Bowl tonight.
---
| |
---
The grassroots support for Leah's campaign continues to grow each day.

This week, Leah [announced the support of some key grassroots supporters](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=80d255427d5b4d6fa3cb87d23cf0003e&_m=36d98774352d41779933d9bedc3672f6&_e=LQ_k68PED4DFRPqkYfs8dThIKfiT0X4pQWt796fa6Yv9Pog0LwppY1ZEYdfv4T4Gn_CHz1al0TLdkKuT6Asbo4KAbaMpEKUjrm5cq2NndKeM_1aT-KPJAzaWnqPM3DEqjiLmdKOFWatS5xEc58w8D-WanoXg9TdM27Vecfx1WddL5MeRzZx9g4h_9Q_0SRlqYt_1yBC52LhBNmTWvkod6yh6olpy9w_axBLq9hMVs92zFJCh-32y3N_vL153xJmnVX-l3RzdTAK62GCtq7iKKbBqcxR63Jev2wMgt4MAY9wZiWDxqHzudvNAf6IpVfUToZxTFIO3muBYXexkJvIzX0cWr3wym-1eYtvwFgyhIes%3D) from Southeast Wisconsin and she announced that [she now has more than 300 endorsements](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=80d255427d5b4d6fa3cb87d23cf0003e&_m=36d98774352d41779933d9bedc3672f6&_e=LQ_k68PED4DFRPqkYfs8dThIKfiT0X4pQWt796fa6YtzFQ0tzwUdLYWrfbRNRGMIkEn_ZWFLZXRT-XDsliBhCw7BMM7mQKL71LWEKQUdO0RiKOIMoLsgNngVRhHKx6hycOSorGY9bo2fPUnFU3pYwYl07TZaj5zCPXMYgAMAvjl5MD0binUy-9B8wR-ka3E_2fXcdDlskdos_zjdUopJjcgA2DKAiF4y4iPmvVH1tjgyjXIbeNiIgfeTRgsdkRH6n7Gihodq1p2c8Zo68zYcqKrxS9yGMKEMeMEckCg1Kr-KIUYfhgYPaC_73CBO0Ph7CtI_ihbkrIIbSFm1DR7RXw%3D%3D) from business leaders, law enforcement, college students, elected officials and conservatives across Wisconsin.
---
|
---
| President Trump's amazing State of the Union address this week outlined the benefits of tax reform, showed how much stronger America is with Republican leadership and was received with overwhelming support.

Unfortunately, because of obstructionist liberal senators like Tammy Baldwin, Obamacare still hasn't been fully repealed and the wall isn't being built yet. We need to elect Leah to the Senate this year and ensure President Trump has another Wisconsin senator who will work with him!
---
| [ ](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=80d255427d5b4d6fa3cb87d23cf0003e&_m=36d98774352d41779933d9bedc3672f6&_e=LQ_k68PED4DFRPqkYfs8dV0Wa7724CtpufeetRm0L3oQm9z7va8Nunfcheev2B3H5BFuk5OhnsGvegu3wQ7iPBZSbdk59gV9yYJVB6v-M580X9i29HQxpjcFKfVx6OD0MFbwbN65kHrhkatrl9TgubGp-zTr4iUxR4dc6S_JDw7D8fUCmtquL2DVbAVM1tRXPmNEM7R2LjF24BzyPNlLabvd9enBn54Rpi6MMOToey2f_6st1tpHqQQ9MGBwNusekd5Z3MQVOyhnYxG4FD4Knoa2iiK0xkhRZ18oS8s6B0c%3D)

This week, Wisconsin Family Action announced that they endorsed Leah in the campaign for U.S. Senate. As a nurse who believes — without exception — that unborn babies should not be murdered, Leah has a proven track record for standing for life. She will take that same commitment to the U.S. Senate.
---
| [Leah announced her Wisconsin Way tour](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=80d255427d5b4d6fa3cb87d23cf0003e&_m=36d98774352d41779933d9bedc3672f6&_e=LQ_k68PED4DFRPqkYfs8dThIKfiT0X4pQWt796fa6YtkKvwE36eg3CrKnsiT6PEDlR3Jw2zp4dK7Iy0t8KmFeQmfDKBTVIYfh4gC11fHnK-LJNom37EgB3x4o8d0gy5QMKUQYaO4SCxqUB-SnCOxCLQxPSWDyFdfEYycFe3f3a18m-mw8uaprtvSAFLjX5SBv4O8sFS2m2PnwoSyyXHlYJ-W0kSweB1veagYRaaCMXmwyn985ulXczpWFCKWH7bg4UCH44APzmexHxAdvYSkJpxBesPmx3oeDxpfrkUKgpA_FdMof47Q3FscsLKY4zDnHmWtwA_kghMfMXXMrhQ3z_HP_I-8LNSGgXCcCka_jrs%3D). As of the end of January, she had visited 27 out of 72 counties, and she hopes to hit all of them in the first few months of the year.
---
|
---
---
| Leah continues visiting with conservative groups across the state. This week she visited the UW–Whitewater College Republicans, held a veterans roundtable in Manitowoc and visited the Calumet and Fond Du Lac County GOPs for their caucuses. **And when she visited the Republican Party of Waukesha County's caucus yesterday she received two standing ovations!**
---
|
---

## [Leah Vukmir: Baldwin Refuses to Vote to Protect Life... Wisconsinites Deserve Better](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=80d255427d5b4d6fa3cb87d23cf0003e&_m=36d98774352d41779933d9bedc3672f6&_e=LQ_k68PED4DFRPqkYfs8dThIKfiT0X4pQWt796fa6YvaBh56uOQfXjJ1AA5ZW8F1yTETLHuhz2aOzhGBLe0qCuvzP3HKP4x-boyDZKiiWP-RFIgQCM4FTmXFLzJP74Sou1SGLCcNf1oG0LgAQ2arjfyzmZS8oOaAR29gtGDRmV3fajrWo1GtXc6BlIy4vlSl3Y7smgV9KhOHC0eAw65gPZUnwRYviALVj7pdkVd2PgQir-aEKXi91gabggkCDnoNLN8y8lAgr-bCNwBPa1qgQaCd4GfNLGLYFEE8uBBnJYxatMI0eUn_S7gxyoN0JUepnQQacqrd9hnTplOWv2DAzBR-TrSQYf99_eqFY6E3xuNYjfv9c9xWwYLjCUoSBpnK)
In an act of utter blatant disregard for her duty as an elected official, Sen. Tammy Baldwin refused to vote on a bill on Monday that would protect unborn children from feeling pain. Minutes after the vote, she reappeared on the Senate floor to cast a vote nomination for a circuit court judge.
---
|
## [Journal Sentinel: Kevin Nicholson did work for Democrats two years after he said he became disillusioned with the party](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=80d255427d5b4d6fa3cb87d23cf0003e&_m=36d98774352d41779933d9bedc3672f6&_e=LQ_k68PED4DFRPqkYfs8dZ3S2aMXNIBjM7kLd0sJcUf8qHcuTVL8asC_FHBGMtuoXDUT-rNB7INi2pqv5YCMCpxcG_GtgkWbn-PkEEOOjBYFi9tgJj-cCVEDqodrSSvzaHafWfgvXjb-K2jmot-bpAmuMJZQ4QK9DsV08UI_aiQIw8e53FzqwaGOOsnQQh6rZHjc4mTwE4sI3gMWvgucSW-cqvL1dGkOiCrp-bG5-BBMFX4DCbAY5_bETUIkkoPFPj20tGUSigJz24_sTmsEzJRDbowBhrSWlKYlc6WYEEvOpR9WuLsMgWvLiwnFN78eA0-3vMYABTRRpH5zxpx54bF48czU9M3xTvpzROFjtmbsTqCGWo4rxjI6zrgu2q7ctJeVNMwr7CEm3aSi5IKcxLm6nXmatYI6x-L6FnMmpQc%3D)
For instance, in January 2017 Nicholson told conservative talk radio host Vicki McKenna that, after speaking at the 2000 Democratic National Convention, he left the event "absolutely sure" he wasn't a Democrat.

But the new Federal Election Commission records — first reported on by the Associated Press — show that Nicholson was paid $7,300 in salary and mileage reimbursements by the Democratic Party in Minnesota in 2002.
---
|
## [The Cap Times: Republican Senate candidate Nicholson supports exceptions to abortion bans on 'case-by-case basis'](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=80d255427d5b4d6fa3cb87d23cf0003e&_m=36d98774352d41779933d9bedc3672f6&_e=744ZWxq6MIzHDPT1S-IZGsHE3r5UHDaQUQvS-zGF_UNJQL1Vi5C7xoEy9_YPb0mpIcglsJevIM0FBUnzuhxeUSeYPgvFBrd8QFX1Z6G0UPzNzbW7cSjNnCSn89Lr-j0wKzReUsyHDD3T43Ak7xY_M6cBrSfniS4U5X_QZVtW_JvLq2ZnLMsgNQsWBHQW5Ust4PJXI8gU6sKduAhornTnOMZDKB5bumBszqjUfS-My_ZKGKEwO6WjshXnih-_F60nWD-s69JV4cBFsa0MnBy2ADU3JXFP4_obt70nCsk0nVoUvbs2R4hTduxx7ZpmUd5TUuVwLP_bQfNceZJg6aLDK2umLPkgWi__Zgx6Jr_1EikvotH32zDwj_YsaPvwMBTf2MJy3lx4t3TxM0Hh3Opi18v9OjsFSlbMQ_tovxwXO064jlwUJMAp7_9k6gq_Vg31_Sgyc6r0L-sa6b6ZKxEE2FZx30ruyrf_4AfIu1b-qTU%3D)
